  в”‚ application/json" -d "{\"name\":\"$STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID\",\"operations\":[
  в”‚ {\"op\":\"create-widget\",\"type\":\"agent\",\"near\":\"$STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID\",\вЂ¦

  adjusting the request URL.
